CAREERS

Baxtec Mechanical Services employs Gas Fitters (I, II, III), Commercial Refrigeration Technicians, Plumbers, and Sheet Metal Installers.  We have a well developed apprenticeship program and we often sponsor co-op students from a number of schools in our community.  Baxtec also employs an experienced technical team to support our field operations.

If you are a motivated, career oriented individual who is eager to learn new things and contribute to a  dynamic, progressive, and growing company, click here to send us your resume.
